text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I have lost to Doto... For me to have<n>been defeated
by her, despite my<n>awakening... What a joyous
achievement!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Yet, Doto's heart is set—not to be my<n>enemy... but
a mutual motivator. An<n>eternal rival, it is!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Rivalry—something which a ruler<n>requires—will help
me achieve the<n>power to overthrow the Golden
Generation! With this settled, the<n>stage is ready.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Golden Generation awaits at the<n>final
battleground... the Arima Kinen!
